title: [v4.1] Cherry-pick windows machine events
body:
Cherry-picks #14206 #14229 to resolve the warning message generated on all podman machine commands.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

```release-note
Fixes runtime warning on podman machine commands on Windows
```
